programme.title: NBA All Star Weekend: All Star Saturday Night
NBA All Star Weekend: All Star Saturday Night
Hardwood Classic
programme.desc: We bring you the classic battles to hake taken place on the hardwood courts of the greatest basketball league in the world: the NBA. These titanic tussles have featured some of the best players to have ever played the game, including Michael Jordan, Magic Johnson, Scottie Pippen, Larry Bird, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Moses Malone. Many of these contests were played in a bruising era, with physicality and aggression far more prevalent factors than today's game. We present coverage of the ties with original commentary alongside interviews with players and coaches.
